ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When opening Obsidian or checking notes, always open your periodic notes even when they haven't just been created. This can be useful for maintaining a consistent workspace with pinned notes each time you start your day.
ast.target: 在打开 Obsidian 或查看笔记时，总是打开你的周期性笔记，即使它们不是刚创建的。这有助于在每天开始时保持包含固定笔记的一致工作区。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When enabled, automatically commit any changes within the vault.
ast.target: 启用后，自动提交仓库内的所有更改。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Set the message to use when committing, where {DATE} will be replaced with the current date.
ast.target: 设置提交时使用的消息，其中 {DATE} 将被替换为当前日期。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Only create new daily notes Monday - Friday, excluding Saturdays and Sundays.
ast.target: 仅在周一至周五创建新的每日笔记，不包括周六和周日。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Automatically open the new note when created.
ast.target: 创建后自动打开新笔记。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Automatically pin the new note to your tabs.
ast.target: 自动将新笔记固定到你的标签页。

ast.name: setName
ast.source: No periodic notes enabled
ast.target: 未启用周期性笔记

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Always open periodic notes
ast.target: 始终打开周期性笔记

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Enable automatic git commit at the end of each day (18:00/6pm)
ast.target: 在每天结束时启用自动 git 提交（18:00/下午6点）

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Git commit message format
ast.target: Git 提交消息格式

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Exclude weekends
ast.target: 排除周末

ast.name: warn
ast.source:
%c[svelte] lifecycle_double_unmount
%cTried to unmount a component that was not mounted
https://svelte.dev/e/lifecycle_double_unmount
ast.target:
%c[svelte] lifecycle_double_unmount
%c尝试卸载一个未挂载的组件
https://svelte.dev/e/lifecycle_double_unmount

ast.name: warn
ast.source:
%c[svelte] state_proxy_unmount
%cTried to unmount a state proxy, rather than a component
https://svelte.dev/e/state_proxy_unmount
ast.target:
%c[svelte] state_proxy_unmount
%c尝试卸载一个状态代理，而不是组件
https://svelte.dev/e/state_proxy_unmount

ast.name: warn
ast.source:
%c[svelte] svelte_boundary_reset_noop
%cA `<svelte:boundary>` `reset` function only resets the boundary the first time it is called
https://svelte.dev/e/svelte_boundary_reset_noop
ast.target:
%c[svelte] svelte_boundary_reset_noop
%c`<svelte:boundary>` 的 `reset` 函数仅在首次调用时重置边界
https://svelte.dev/e/svelte_boundary_reset_noop

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: The Periodic Notes plugin must be installed and available for Auto Periodic Notes to work.
ast.target: 必须安装并可用 Periodic Notes 插件，Auto Periodic Notes 才能正常工作。
